wordplay_note: The protagonist who questions the machine
card_description: Arthur Dill is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Vulcan's Hammer*. Functionary who begins to question Unity's reliance on Vulcan 3. Name note: The protagonist who questions the machine. The questioner within the machine — resistance from inside. First appears in *Vulcan's Hammer*.

reference.brief: Functionary who begins to question Unity's reliance on Vulcan 3
reference.significance: The questioner within the machine — resistance from inside
